description: Unique property in Dallas 75216 Recently formally appraised for $885,000 (See Drive). Details: 3/2 main house with a garage. 1/1 attached ADU. total approx. sqft for both combined = 3,954 sf. Then a 2/1 apartment above the garage approx 973 sqft. We are estimating rents at $4,000 for all combined. $1,900/mo for the 3/2, $1,200/mo for the 2/1, 9$00/mo for the attached 1/1. ARV is very up in the air. most local sales are new builds MUCH smaller that are selling in the mid to high $400's. The attached appraisal went much further out to find comps and they made the case that the value is 885,000. Do you own due diligence
